summary: AI Voice Tutor (Divya/Sher) feature testing complete. All 3 backend endpoints working. Frontend flows tested on desktop and mobile. 13/13 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: Error message leaks internal implementation details ('litellm.APIConnectionError') - should return user-friendly message

issues: Tutor avatar images (/images/divya_avatar.png, /images/sher_avatar.png) show placeholder backgrounds but load correctly

critical_code_review_comments: divya_live_routes.py line 100-104: Chat history handling is good - limits to last 8 messages
divya_live_routes.py line 131: TTS text limited to 4000 chars - good safeguard
divya_live_routes.py line 238-239: Audio file size limit of 25MB is appropriate
DivyaTutor.js line 183-220: sendMessage has proper error handling with user-friendly fallback
DivyaTutor.js line 156-171: Audio playback with proper cleanup (URL.revokeObjectURL)
DivyaTutor.js line 224-255: Voice recording with barge-in support (stopAudio on recording start)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All flows working on desktop and mobile

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Voice Tutor feature fully functional. Key tests: POST /api/divya/live/ask returns text+audio_base64, POST /api/divya/live/upload-context extracts PDF text, POST /api/divya/live/transcribe transcribes audio. Frontend requires localStorage auth tokens (token, auth_token, ceibaa_user). Divya uses 'nova' TTS voice, Sher uses 'shimmer'. Response time is 5-10 seconds for AI+TTS generation.

backend_api_tests.test_ask_divya_simple_question: PASS - Divya responds with text + audio
backend_api_tests.test_ask_sher_simple_question: PASS - Sher responds with text + audio
backend_api_tests.test_ask_with_context: PASS - Context from PDF affects response

frontend_ui_tests.setup_screen_hero_visible: PASS - AI Voice Tutor header with avatars
frontend_ui_tests.language_selector_visible: PASS - 7 languages (en, hi, ta, mr, te, kn, bn)

feature_verification.tutor_selection: VERIFIED - Divya and Sher cards clickable, start session with welcome
feature_verification.language_selection: VERIFIED - 7 languages available (English, Hindi, Tamil, Marathi, Telugu, Kannada, Bengali)
feature_verification.pdf_upload: VERIFIED - Upload extracts text context for tutoring
feature_verification.text_conversation: VERIFIED - User sends text, gets tutor response with audio
feature_verification.audio_response: VERIFIED - Base64 MP3 audio returned and plays automatically
feature_verification.barge_in_support: CODE VERIFIED - startRecording calls stopAudio() first (line 227)
